summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Power BI Report Designer SPA. Frontend-only application with React + Konva.js + Zustand working excellently. All core features tested and functional.
passed_tests: Template modal shows on page load with 6 templates (Executive Summary, Sales Dashboard, Operational, Clinical Tracking, HR/Recruitment, Blank Canvas)
Template selection loads zones on canvas correctly
Zone selection with transform handles working
Properties panel shows when zone selected (label, position, size, style)
Zone property editing (label update, position, size)
Theme tab with background presets (Dark Navy, Light Gray, White Clean, etc.)
Color palette functionality with presets (Corporate, Accessible, Pastel, Dark Mode, Monochrome)
Canvas size selector in toolbar (1280x720, 1920x1080, 1600x900)
Zoom controls (in/out/fit) working properly
Grid toggle shows/hides grid overlay
Preview mode hides zone labels correctly
Add elements from sidebar via click (KPI Card, Pie Chart, etc.)
Element search in sidebar
Export dialog with PNG/SVG/JSON options
Undo/Redo functionality via buttons and keyboard shortcuts
Delete zone with Delete key
Duplicate zone with Ctrl+D keyboard shortcut
Templates tab in sidebar with template switching
Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y redo, Delete key, Ctrl+D duplicate)
Properties panel duplicate and delete buttons
Canvas background theme changes
Element positioning and styling
